heading: Effect of other laws
label: 138i Effect of other laws
text: Nothing in this chapter shall alter the authority of the Secretary of Health and Human Services under the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act ( et seq.).21 U.S.C. 301
notes: References in TextThe Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act, referred to in text, is , , which is classified generally to chapter 9 (§ 301 et seq.) of Title 21, Food and Drugs. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act June 25, 1938, ch. 67552 Stat. 1040section 301 of Title 21
